templates.name: Standard Welcome Greeting
templates.content:
Hi {{PatientName}}! 👋

Thank you for reaching out to Aura Dermatology! We have received your inquiry regarding {{TreatmentInterested}}.

Dr. Sharma and our care team will contact you shortly to schedule your consultation.

In the meantime, feel free to call us at +91 98765 43210 or visit our clinic at 404 Green Valley Blvd.

Warm regards,
The Aura Care Team

templates.name: Laser Resurfacing Welcome
templates.content:
Subject: Your Laser Consultation at Aura Dermatology

Dear {{PatientName}},

Thank you for requesting information on {{TreatmentInterested}}. We are excited to guide you on your skin rejuvenation journey.

Here is what you can expect during your consultation:
- A detailed scan using our Visia Skin Analysis tool.
- A customized treatment schedule based on your recovery availability.
- A complete overview of pre-care and post-care guidelines.

Our concierge will call you within 24 hours. If you want to speak with us immediately, call +91 98765 43210.

Sincerely,
Dr. Ananya Sharma, MD
Aura Dermatology & Aesthetics

templates.name: Appointment Reminder
templates.content: Hi {{PatientName}}, this is Aura Dermatology. Reminder for your upcoming consultation on {{AppointmentDate}} at {{AppointmentTime}}. Reply C to confirm or call +91 98765 43210 to reschedule.
